title: Uchicraftana
description: Epic Fight Crafting recipes for Epic Fight and Weapons of Miracles
body:
This mod adds simple crafting recipes for the Uchigatana and Bokken of Epic Fight mod, aswell as Agony, Ruine, Herrscher & Gesetz, Ender Blaster, Moonless, Torment (Tormented Mind), Solar and the Demon Seal!

The recipes can be viewed in the images tab and with jei in-game.

 

WARNING: THIS MOD IS SERVER-SIDE! IT WILL NOT WORK ON SERVERS THAT DO NOT HAVE IT! THAT INCLUDES ESSENTIAL LOBBIES

/give @a uchicraftana:opinion{["Modrinth specific":
"This mod was only uploaded here for ease of use. I don't actually plan on profitting off this little ''Project,'' I just want to make it easier to access, since Curseforge's API is dogshit.
**Excuse my language.**"]}


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

GREATSWORD SUPREMICY

</details>

Also, for the new items to be useful, you'll need forge 47.3.0+ because WoM needs it for 1.8.5+
